Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce POWL model that captures the process based on given logs

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Core sequence OR MS QS AS IQC maybe multiple times TST RT TST repeated until passed PK LB optional DP D

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also there are cases where after QS they go straight to TST case 4 skipping AS Actually case 4 shows AS at 950 then TST at 1020 no IQC So maybe AS can be optional But case 4 shows AS present they got AS earlier then TST So perhaps after QS you can either go to AS then repeated IQC AS loops or go directly to TST

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also labeling optional after PK a choice to do LB or skip

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also after TST there may be RT leading back to TST loop possibly multiple times model as loop between TST and RT Actually they do TST if fail then RT then TST again So we have a loop TST RT TST repeated until passed Equivalent to loop node where body is TST and exit after success but we can model as loop between TST and RT

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually loop operator means execute A then either exit or execute B then A again repeating So to represent TST then possibly RT then TST again we can set A TST B RT That matches

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now AS and IQC there appears to be a pattern AS then IQC then possibly AS again etc

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Simplify we can model as a loop where you can repeat AS then IQC zero or more times but also allow extra IQC at end

Name: Validation - IND
Text: However given limited spec we can approximate with a loop of AS IQC meaning AS then IQC repeats and after loop you proceed to TST

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Given complexity we can propose a POWL model Start OR then MS then QS then a Choice between Subprocess AssemblyLoop Loop of AS IQC then TST and Direct to TST

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we can model as after QS a Choice between Path1 Loop AS IQC then TST and Path2 TST directly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We also have case where after QS they go to TST directly case4 Good

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after TST we have loop of RT then TST Then PK Then optional LB Choice between LB and skip silent transition Then DP then D

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now construct POWL using StrictPartialOrder with nodes in sequence OR MS QS XOR between assembly path and direct TST LOOP between TST and RT PK XOR between LB and skip DP D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Need to ensure ordering after step 4 choice we go to step5 TST RT loop If choice picks direct TST we still go to loop If choice picks AssemblyLoop then TST we also go to loop Good

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We could also swap to loop IQC AS Not perfect either

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the instruction we just need to produce a POWL model that captures relationships not perfect
